prompt: Generate a computer graphics image: A detailed CAD surface model render of a high-performance sports car, inspired by the dynamic angle and subject of the reference image, presented in a clean, technical shading style.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a high-performance sports car, rendered as a detailed CAD surface model. The perspective should be a dynamic low-angle, front-three-quarter view, capturing the car as if in motion on a road or track, mirroring the subject's pose and framing seen in image 1. The image should feature a clean, technical shading style, emphasizing the car's intricate design and precise surface contours.
objects: Car rendered as a detailed CAD surface model
Dynamic low-angle, front-three-quarter perspective of the car
Car positioned as if in motion
Motion blur effect on the road and background
Hills or mountains in the background
